0.text: Thickening of the pleura adjacent to the effusion on the right

1.text: Diffuse emphysematous changes in both lungs

2.text: Consolidations in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Consolidations in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

4.text: Recent consolidations in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

5.text: Recent consolidations in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

6.text: Atelectasis adjacent to the effusion in both lower lobes

7.text: Linear atelectasis in other parts of both lungs

8.text: Pleuroparenchymal scarring in other parts of both lungs
